expectations.text: Output is valid JSON matching the skill's schema (all 5 components present)
expectations.evidence: JSON has scenario.scene, scenario.evidence, scenario.characters, scenario.debateTriggers, scenario.teacherKey, scenario.portalIntegration — all present and correctly structured.

expectations.text: Contains exactly 4-6 pieces of forensic evidence
expectations.evidence: 5 evidence items (E1-E5): cast-off pattern, transfer stain on doorknob, void pattern, satellite spatter, bloody shoe impression.

expectations.text: At least 2 pieces of evidence point to different suspects (Contradiction Rule)
expectations.evidence: E1 (cast-off) points to Marcus (right-handed) OR Derek (left-handed backhand). E4 (satellite spatter) points to Derek (injured hand) OR Marcus (weapon dripping). E5 (shoe print) points to Marcus OR Claudia. Multiple contradictions present.

expectations.text: All characters have both a selfless act and a selfish act (Moral Gray Rule)
expectations.evidence: All 5 characters (Helen, Marcus, Derek, Claudia, Janice) have explicit selflessAct and selfishAct fields with specific, detailed past instances.

expectations.text: Blood spatter terminology is scientifically accurate and 9th-grade appropriate
expectations.evidence: Uses correct BPA terms: cast-off, transfer stain, void pattern, satellite spatter, ABFO No. 2 scale, ridge detail, class vs. individual evidence, directionality. Terms are used in context with accessible explanations.

expectations.text: Teacher key explains all contradictory evidence with valid forensic science
expectations.evidence: Every evidence item (E1-E5) has a detailed explanation. Cast-off from second swing explained (weapon clean on first strike). Void from tablet explained with coagulation timing. Satellite spatter from mortar dripping. Shoe impression from exit. All scientifically sound.

expectations.text: Scene description is spatially precise enough to sketch a crime scene diagram
expectations.evidence: Room: 16ft x 22ft, L-shaped counter on west/south walls, center island 3ft x 5ft positioned 4ft from west counter, dining table with 8x6ft rug, sliding door centered on north wall, pantry in SW corner. Compass directions and measurements throughout.
